content: OpenSSL cross-compilation fails because pkg-config cannot find cross-target headers. Fix: set OPENSSL_DIR for the target arch, or enable the 'vendored' feature to compile OpenSSL from source (requires perl, make, C cross-compiler). The ring crate embeds its own C/asm and generally compiles fine with cross-rs. aarch64-unknown-linux-musl + OpenSSL is particularly broken without vendored. cloudbar has no OpenSSL dep so this is N/A.
